disclaimer: A real, measured benchmark of DESi_baseline_frozen_v1 vs DESi_mutated_v31 over the identical workload (papers / claims / queries / tasks). The mutated version performs far fewer recomputes while producing byte-identical outputs; governance is identical and replay is stable. The stored metric is the deterministic recompute reduction (not projected, no synthetic estimate); wall-clock is observed live but never stored. Regression survival is confirmed by the mandatory full regression. Human approval is mandatory.
